scoring_rubric.speed: Time to proof, cycle compression, MTTR.

games.name: MVP Sprint Duel v1
games.brief: Race to build and prove a minimum viable feature from scratch.
games.do: Build a working MVP for a single ICP and ship a proof within 24 hours.
games.make: MVP repo link + one-pager + 3 user screenshots confirming value.
games.kpi: Time-to-first-value ≤ 24h and ≥ 10 qualified replies.
games.helps: Speed-to-learning; reduces cycle time from idea to proof.
games.accept: All artifacts present; replies verified; deadline met.
constraints: Solo only: no partners, no team assistance.
No paid traffic unless explicitly stated in the brief.
Artifacts and logs must be timestamped and reproducible.

games.name: Latency Speedrun v1
games.brief: Compress the end-to-end publish latency solo.
games.do: Measure draft→publish→index latency, remove 1 bottlenecks, remeasure.
games.make: Timing table before/after + change log + reproducible steps.
games.kpi: Median and P95 latency −25% without quality loss.
games.helps: Faster loops = more cycles/day, more surface for wins.
games.accept: Before/after credible; no regressions; metrics replicated.
constraints: Solo only: no partners, no team assistance.
No paid traffic unless explicitly stated in the brief.
Artifacts and logs must be timestamped and reproducible.

games.name: Index Discovery Duel v1
games.brief: Be first to make a new feature discoverable.
games.do: Publish a feature doc and tune search so it appears top-3 for 6 test queries.
games.make: Doc pack + index config + test query sheet.
games.kpi: Recall ≥ 75% across test queries; TTFD ≤ 2s.
games.helps: Improves internal discovery and onboarding speed.
games.accept: Third-party verifier replicates results.
constraints: Solo only: no partners, no team assistance.
No paid traffic unless explicitly stated in the brief.
Artifacts and logs must be timestamped and reproducible.

games.name: Hookcraft CTR Duel v1
games.brief: Craft hooks that reliably beat baseline.
games.do: Create 6 hook variants for one asset and run fair A/B.
games.make: Hook bank + A/B setup + results table.
games.kpi: Best hook CTR ≥ 1.3× baseline; watch-through not worse by 10%.
games.accept: Winning hook canonized with evidence.
constraints: Solo only: no partners, no team assistance.
No paid traffic unless explicitly stated in the brief.
Artifacts and logs must be timestamped and reproducible.

games.name: Conversion LP A/B Duel v1
games.brief: Compete on landing-page conversion for the same ICP.
games.do: Ship two LP angles; split traffic evenly; document outcomes in 4 days.
games.make: Two LPs + traffic log + conversion ledger.
games.kpi: Winner ≥ 1.3× conversion over control, with ≥ 200 visitors.
games.accept: Traffic authenticity validated; winner rationale written.
constraints: Solo only: no partners, no team assistance.
No paid traffic unless explicitly stated in the brief.
Artifacts and logs must be timestamped and reproducible.

games.name: Objection Handling Duel v1
games.brief: Defang the top objections head-to-head.
games.do: Collect top 5 objections; script counters; run 10 demos each.
games.make: Objection deck + demo logs + user confirmations.
games.kpi: Objection win-rate ≥ 65% with at least 6 user validations.
games.helps: Improves close rate and narrative discipline.
games.accept: Deck merged; logs complete; validations attached.
constraints: Solo only: no partners, no team assistance.
No paid traffic unless explicitly stated in the brief.
Artifacts and logs must be timestamped and reproducible.

games.name: Bug Bash Race v1
games.brief: Fix the highest-impact bugs under time pressure.
games.do: Fix 4 bugs from a prioritized list; include tests and notes.
games.make: PR links + test runs + impact notes.
games.kpi: All merged; regression tests pass; user pain reduced ≥ 25% by survey.
games.helps: Raises quality and trust; fewer fire drills.
games.accept: CI green; post-merge incident rate = 0 for 7 days.
constraints: Solo only: no partners, no team assistance.

games.do: Implement ranking rules; synonyms; typo tolerance; evaluators run tests.
games.make: Config file + eval results + change log.
games.kpi: nDCG@10 ≥ 0.84 and TTFD ≤ 1.5s on the suite.
games.accept: Evaluator sign-off with reproducible results.
constraints: Solo only: no partners, no team assistance.
No paid traffic unless explicitly stated in the brief.
Artifacts and logs must be timestamped and reproducible.

games.name: Pipeline Automation Duel v1

games.make: Script + diagram + logs over 4 days.
games.kpi: Error rate < 2% and throughput +15%.
games.helps: Reliability and capacity go up with the same headcount.
games.accept: Fallback documented; monitor in place; logs clean.
constraints: Solo only: no partners, no team assistance.

games.name: Content Remix Duel v1

games.kpi: Total engagement ≥ 1.7× the long; save/share ↑ 18%
games.accept: Proof links provided; attribution consistent.
constraints: Solo only: no partners, no team assistance.

games.name: Thumbnail Design Duel v1

games.make: Thumbnails + test setup + CTR report.

games.accept: Original files + test links + winner rationale.

games.kpi: MTTR ≤ 26 min; no repeat in 4 days.
games.helps: Builds calm, effective response under stress.
games.accept: RCA accepted; tests added; no recurrences.
constraints: Solo only: no partners, no team assistance.
